title: Yotbah #3192
definition:
Jotbah = "pleasing"

 1) a city in Judah, hometown of Meshullemeth, wife of king Manasseh
    1a) site unknown
nasbUsage:

 1) a city in Judah, hometown of Meshullemeth, wife of king Manasseh
